creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-08-19 11:00:26 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel/cvs2cl         Makefile distinfo 
  Log:
  - Fixed wrong SIZE and checksum entries.
  - Fixed maintainer stupidity on patching.
  - Fixed manpage generation.
  - Use DIST_SUBDIR as recommended by sat@.
  - Added new MIRROR_SITES entry to provide backwards compatibility from
    version 2.67 and above.
  
  PR:             115245
  Submitted by:   Marcus von Appen <mva@sysfault.org> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.27      +8 -3      ports/devel/cvs2cl/Makefile
  1.19      +3 -3      ports/devel/cvs2cl/distinfo
